User.title: User
User.description: A user of the SafeWalk platform.

uid.description: The unique ID of the user.

name.description: The full name of the user.

email.description: The email address of the user.

phone.description: The phone number of the user.

photoURL.description: The URL of the user's profile picture.

Alert.title: Alert
Alert.description: An SOS alert triggered by a user.

userId.description: The ID of the user who triggered the alert.

phone.description: The phone number of the user.

photoURL.description: The photo URL of the user.

lat.description: The latitude of the alert location.

lng.description: The longitude of the alert location.

time.description: The time the alert was triggered.

resolvedAt.description: The timestamp when the alert was resolved.

Route.title: Route
Route.description: A saved route in the user's history.

safetyScore.description: The safety score of the route.

route.description: The JSON stringified coordinates of the route.

time.description: The time the route was saved.

Review.title: Review
Review.description: A review or complaint about a specific route.

userId.description: The ID of the user who wrote the review.

routeId.description: The ID of the route being reviewed.

rating.description: The rating given to the route (1-5).

Zone.title: Zone
Zone.description: A safety or risk zone defined on the map.

id.description: The unique ID of the zone.

center.description: The [lat, lng] center of the zone.

radius.description: The radius of the zone in meters.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the zone was created.

createdBy.description: The ID of the user who created the zone.
